description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a black synthetic collapsible stock and a prominent pistol grip. The upper receiver features a carry handle integrated with iron sights, while the handguard is ribbed for grip and extends to a short, standard barrel. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer materials. The rifle's finish is predominantly matte black with some metallic highlights, giving it a utilitarian and robust appearance. The front sight is a fixed post, and the muzzle is simple, lacking any visible suppressor or brake. The design is compact, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is important.
description: A compact, tactical black rifle with a collapsible stock, carry handle, ribbed handguard, and detachable box magazine. Its robust, matte finish and ergonomic features make it suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, carry handle, ribbed handguard, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with more detail on the magazine and receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and the rear of the carry handle.
